rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF RICHARD M. WOLFE
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #3, REPORT, FEES
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing, but with the correct balance of fees to the conservator being $16,318.25 and the correct amount of costs to the attorney to be $2,555.00. (There is no such thing as a "supplement and amendment to" a petition. If a pleading merely supplements a petition it may not amend any portion of the petition, and no notice is required. If a pleading amends a petition, it may also provide supplemental information but is still an amendment to the petition, and notice is required. [CRC 7.3 and 7.53.]

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF SIGRID ANITA GERDA BORCHERT
rulings.Calendar Matter: PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 03/18/2020. The following issues must be resolved: 1) Notice of hearing of the status report must be served on the three potential heirs identified in the Notice of Partial Assignment of Intestate Estate filed on 07/11/2019, as the limited powers of attorney signed by the heirs (Exhibit B) did not specifically waive such notice; 2) Notice of hearing of the status report must also be served on Erben-Ermittlung Emrich Zossen GmbH & Co. KG as the only assignee identified in their agreements with the heirs (Exhibit A attached to the Notice of Partial Assignment of Intestate Estate); and 3) A link between Erben-Ermittlung Emrich Zossen GmbH & Co. KG and W.C. Cox & Co. must be described in sufficient details to establish W.C. Cox & Co.'s assignee status.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF VICTOR CADIZ
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 4/1/20. No proposed order. [LRSF 14.6 A.] (Proposed orders may not be e-filed and must not be attached to a filed pleading) The petition caption does not disclose that fees are being requested, including (possibly) extraordinary fees. The fees are, however, also missing from the prayer. No fee declaration has been filed for the extraordinary services, if they are in fact being requested. [CRC 7.702.] Original bank statements do not appear to have been filed. [LRSF 14.62.] A statement regarding retention of the original statements must also be filed. [LRSF 2.11 M.4.] The prayer also does not appear to show the specific distribution proposed. [CRC 7.651 and LRSF 14.67 L.7.] The rest of the petition has not been reviewed, as an amended petition will need to be filed.

rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE GEORGE K. CHEN AND NANCY N. CHEN FAMILY TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
rulings.Rulings: administrative continuance to 03/04/20. No examiner available. File stamped single sided courtesy copies are required for any papers filed with the court and must be dropped off at the Superior Court in room 202. (LRSF 2.7, 14.6). A hard copy of the proposed order must be dropped off at the Superior Court in room 202. (LRSF 14.93). [Proposed orders may not be e-filed.]

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE BERNYL L. REED AND ANNA K. REED 1989 REVOCABLE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For: (1) Breach Of Trust; (2) Compelling Trustee To Return Trust Property To Trust; (3) Compelling Distribution From The Trust; (4) Compellin
rulings.Rulings: Appearances by both counsel are required to inform the court of the following: (1) whether the parties have met and conferred to agree upon a roadmap for resolution; (2) whether the parties are willing to participate in pro bono mediation offered by the court per LRSF 14.11 or other form of ADR; and (3) when a next hearing date should be scheduled for status purposes.
